note: Manually maintained by Claude each session. Update status + notes to reflect real current state. Status keys: live | partial | inprog | unused | retired

email-agent.notes: Running 24/7 on VPS (systemd) — classifies Gmail + drafts Slack replies hourly. Auto-archive enabled.

morning-briefing.notes: Running on VPS as systemd service — fires daily 8am with emails/invoices/priorities.

invoice-system.notes: Receipt scanner + payments + dates + mileage all working. VPS cron at 9am daily.

social-media-analytics.notes: All 4 platforms LIVE (YouTube/TikTok/IG/FB). Meta via Playwright scraper, NOT Graph API.

content-researcher.notes: LIVE on Windows + Mac. Repositioned 2026-06-02 as a GRAYDIENT-BRAND tool (find topics for Gray's own content); only used for Sai when specifically needed.

transcriber.notes: Renamed from content-pipeline 2026-06-02 and stripped to transcription-only (clip-picking removed). Local Whisper lives on Windows; --meeting-notes needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.

hook-optimizer.notes: Archived 2026-06-02 to python-scripts/_archive/. Never used; short-form story-arc playbook handles hooks now.

founders-series.notes: Archived 2026-06-02 to python-scripts/_archive/. No longer used (Founder Series content SOP stays; helper script retired).

creator-intel.notes: Built on Windows. Needs YouTube OAuth setup.

footage-organizer.notes: ffmpeg + .env installed on Windows. Needs real footage folder test.

personal-assistant.notes: Commander with 7 tools including build_project autonomous code-writing agent.

expense-tracker.notes: Auto-syncs expenses from Gmail via GitHub Actions to Payday Checklist.

photo-organizer.notes: Built. Not in regular workflow yet.

payday-checklist.notes: Live on GitHub Pages. Auto-expense sync via Gmail + Claude Haiku + GitHub Actions.

analytical.notes: SaaS web app — backend + frontend running locally. Charts polished. Stripe deferred until beta users.

analytical-demo.notes: Marketing landing page + demo dashboard for Analytical SaaS.

brand-board.notes: Static color reference for Graydient Media brand.

social-media-analytics-web.notes: Static web dashboard mirroring Sheets data.
